summary_en: 14,000k shares (2.0% of S/O) up to ¥50.0B. Acquisition period May 15 – Sep 30, 2026 via open-market purchase on TSE. Cancellation of all acquired shares scheduled Oct 20, 2026. Rationale: capital efficiency improvement.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 14,000 thousand ordinary shares (2.0% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) at a maximum cost of ¥50.0 billion. The acquisition period runs from May 15 to September 30, 2026 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under a discretionary trading agreement. All shares acquired under this program will be cancelled on October 20, 2026. The company states the buyback aims to improve capital efficiency, taking into account capital adequacy, capital deployment for medium- to long-term profit growth, and current share price levels. The company also published a shareholder return policy targeting a total payout ratio of 50% or higher, with treasury stock acquisition positioned as a flexible return measure based on financial performance, capital position, and share price.
